column1: # txid and e2eid entries. Verified live 2026-07-04:
pix e2eid endToEndId identificador fim a fim
# Full-pipeline case: this natural-language phrasing does NOT contain the
# literal "txid" jargon, so it only gets helped once the txid entry's
# "transac" stem fires via --mode multi. Run against the live binary:
# `pixkb search "ver os dados de uma cobrança pelo identificador da
# transação" --mode multi` (this exact query already exists, currently
# failing, in eval/cases-fuzzy-ids.tsv — tophit.sh only exercises default
# hybrid mode, so it won't show this fix; check --mode multi manually).
